mapper.select: SELECT d.*, COALESCE(c.comment_count, 0) as comment_count, COALESCE(col.collection_count, 0) as collection_count FROM documents d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT document_id, COUNT(*) as comment_count FROM comments GROUP BY document_id ) c ON d.id = c.document_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT document_id, COUNT(*) as collection_count FROM document_collections GROUP BY document_id ) col ON d.id = col.document_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC
SELECT d.* FROM document_collections dc JOIN documents d ON dc.document_id = d.id WHERE dc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY dc.created_at DESC

SELECT d.*, COALESCE(c.comment_count, 0) as comment_count, COALESCE(col.collection_count, 0) as collection_count FROM documents d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT document_id, COUNT(*) as comment_count FROM comments GROUP BY document_id ) c ON d.id = c.document_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT document_id, COUNT(*) as collection_count FROM document_collections GROUP BY document_id ) col ON d.id = col.document_id WHERE d.id IN
#{id}
